rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relationship to Elec. Code §63.001, which governs voter identification procedures at polling places. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 63.001. REGULAR PROCEDURE FOR ACCEPTING VOTER.
_note: No conflict; the rule cited governs election voter-ID procedures and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
